patternDashboard.emptyDescription: We couldn't find any matching crochet patterns. Try adjusting your search filters or browse our classic collections.

patternItem.materialSectionDescription: Tools and materials required for this project

notFound.pageDoesNotExistErrorMessage: It looks like this page does not exist yet. The page may have moved, or the link might be broken.

patternDashboardErrorPage.genericErrorMessage: We're having trouble reaching the database. A quick refresh might fix it.
patternDashboardErrorPage.invalidPageErrorMessage: We couldn't find that page of patterns. It might have been moved or deleted.
patternDashboardErrorPage.title: Something is not right

footer.cookieNote: We use a strictly necessary cookie to remember your language preference.

legal.aiSecText: Patterns and search profiles compiled or modified via our AI assistance modules are provided 'as is' for creative guidance. While we aim for absolute clarity, knitka.ai does not guarantee error-free stitch instructions or yarn matching calculations.
legal.cookiesSecText: We use a single, strictly necessary functional cookie named 'NEXT_LOCALE' to remember your chosen language preference across sessions. This cookie does not track your browsing history on other websites, contains no personal identifying data, and is essential to deliver a localized interface.
legal.dataSecText: Because knitka.ai utilizes advanced AI engines to assist your crafting workflow, any user analytics gathered are strictly anonymous and used solely to optimize search relevance, pattern classification speeds, and overall application performance.
legal.privacyIntro: At knitka.ai, your privacy is exceptionally important to us. This policy details how we handle the minimal data needed to operate our online platform.
legal.termsIntro: Welcome to knitka.ai. By accessing or using our website, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions.
legal.usageSecText: Our smart crochet and knitting discovery engine is provided for your personal, non-commercial crafting inspiration. You agree not to scrape, exploit, or disrupt our backend AI infrastructure or database pools.

about.missionText: To empower makers worldwide by bridging the gap between centuries-old textile traditions and state-of-the-art technology, keeping the joy of handmade creation alive in a digital world.
about.storyText: knitka.ai was born out of a passion for needlework and a desire to make crafting more accessible. We are building an intelligent portal that uses generative AI to help crafters search, organize, and even generate smart crochet and knitting patterns effortlessly.
about.subtitle: Where traditional crafting meets modern AI innovation.
about.title: About knitka.ai

home.feat1Desc: Find patterns exactly how you think. Search fluidly across our index by pattern name, design style, or custom tags like 'Amigurumi' and 'Garments'.
home.feat2Desc: Filter and match patterns directly by your available materials. Discover designs tailored to your specific yarn type, hook size, or row gauge.
home.feat3Desc: Track modifications easily. Check, compare, and switch between different versions or sizing adaptations of the exact same pattern profile.
home.footerCtaDesc: Contact me directly on Telegram or VK with the design details, name, or yarn type, and I will add it to the platform.
home.footerCtaTitle: Want your pattern to appear here?
home.heroSubtitle: Find patterns fluidly by name, yarn type, or style, and effortlessly track custom versions or gauge adaptations of the exact same design profile.
home.heroTitle: The intelligent engine for handcrafted design.

featuredPatterns.emptyDesc: Our catalog is expanding quickly. If you are an amigurumi designer or knitting creator, send your pattern profile to feature it on our homepage.
featuredPatterns.emptyTitle: Your actual pattern could be here instead of an AI-generated one!
